title: GitHub security advisory (AV26-720)
description: On July 16, 2026, GitHub published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitHub Enterprise Server  versions 3.21.x prior to 3.21.3
GitHub Enterprise Server  versions 3.20.x prior to 3.20.5
GitHub Enterprise Server  versions 3.19.x prior to 3.19.9
GitHub Enterprise Server  versions 3.18.x prior to 3.18.12
GitHub Enterprise Server  versions 3.17.x prior to 3.17.18
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
